task: click-through rate (CTR) prediction and top-K recommendation
input: user-item interaction data and knowledge graph
output: predicted CTR (probability of click) and ranked item list
backbone: DeepFM + GCN (three-part architecture: DeepFM, DNN, GCN)
loss: not specified (likely binary cross-entropy for CTR)
key_idea: combine DeepFM for feature interactions and GCN for item representation from knowledge graph
